metadata.name: Rhystic Study — trigger on opponent cast with Lightning Bolt targeting P1
metadata.description: P1 controls Rhystic Study on the battlefield. P2 (active player) casts Lightning Bolt targeting P1. Per CR 603.2/603.3, Rhystic Study's triggered ability ('whenever an opponent casts a spell') fires immediately when P2 casts Lightning Bolt and goes on the stack above Lightning Bolt (LIFO). The trigger resolves first: since the engine runs MayPayOrElse in non-interactive mode (or_else always fires), P1 draws 1 card. Then Lightning Bolt resolves, dealing 3 damage to P1 (40 -> 37). Final: P1 at 37 life, hand count 4 (3 initial + 1 drawn). CR 603.2: the enrich_spec_from_def path correctly wires OpponentCastsSpell via WheneverOpponentCastsSpell in the card definition.
metadata.generation_notes: Rhystic Study oracle: 'Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {1}.' Per CR 603.2, the trigger event is an opponent casting a spell. Per CR 603.3, the triggered ability is flushed to the stack immediately as part of process_command(CastSpell) — not after a priority pass. After the cast, the stack has 2 items: Lightning Bolt (bottom) and the Rhystic Study trigger (top). The trigger goes on top per LIFO (CR 405.1). P2 and P1 pass priority round 1 -> trigger resolves -> P1 draws 1 card (MayPayOrElse or_else path, non-interactive). P2 and P1 pass priority round 2 -> Lightning Bolt resolves -> P1 takes 3 damage (40 -> 37). Final state: P1 has 4 cards in hand (3 initial + 1 drawn), life at 37. This script was originally written to document the broken behavior (trigger not firing) when enrich_spec_from_def lacked the WheneverOpponentCastsSpell mapping. That gap was fixed in the Opponent-Casts Trigger implementation (step 3). The dispute is now resolved and the script updated to reflect correct engine behavior. Confirmed by test_rhystic_study_enrich_path_trigger_fires (tests/effects.rs).

disputes.description: Originally: trigger did not fire because enrich_spec_from_def lacked the WheneverOpponentCastsSpell -> TriggerEvent::OpponentCastsSpell mapping. Stack count after cast was 1 (only Lightning Bolt), and P1's hand stayed at 3.
disputes.resolution: RESOLVED (2026-02-26): The WheneverOpponentCastsSpell enrichment block was added to enrich_spec_from_def in replay_harness.rs (step 3 of the Opponent-Casts Trigger implementation). The trigger now correctly fires via the enrich path. Stack count after cast is 2 (Lightning Bolt + trigger); P1 draws 1 card; final hand count is 4. Confirmed by test_rhystic_study_enrich_path_trigger_fires.

script.step_note: P2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting P1. Rhystic Study trigger fires immediately (enrich_spec_from_def path). Trigger resolves first (P1 draws), then Lightning Bolt resolves (P1 takes 3 damage).

actions.description: Initial: Rhystic Study on P1 battlefield, Lightning Bolt in P2 hand, P1 has 3 cards in hand, stack empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: P2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting P1. {R} paid from pool. CR 603.2: Rhystic Study trigger fires immediately (opponent cast a spell) and is flushed to the stack in the same process_command call.

actions.description: After cast: Lightning Bolt + Rhystic Study trigger on stack (count 2), P2 hand empty
actions.note: CR 603.3: triggered ability is placed on the stack the next time a player would receive priority. The engine flushes triggers immediately in process_command(CastSpell), so the stack has 2 items: Lightning Bolt (bottom, cast first) and Rhystic Study trigger (top, LIFO per CR 405.1).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority with the Rhystic Study trigger on top. Trigger resolves: P1 may draw a card (MayPayOrElse — non-interactive mode, or_else always fires, P1 draws).

resolution.note: CR 603.2: Rhystic Study trigger resolves. MayPayOrElse: P2 declines to pay {1}, so P1 draws 1 card (hand 3 -> 4). Non-interactive mode: or_else always fires.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Rhystic Study triggered ability resolves. P1 draws 1 card. Lightning Bolt remains on stack.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority with Lightning Bolt on the stack. Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to target player P1 (40 -> 37).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Lightning Bolt resolves; deals 3 damage to P1; card moves to P2's graveyard.

actions.description: Final: stack empty, P1 at 37 life, P1 hand count 4 (drew from Rhystic Study trigger), Lightning Bolt in P2 graveyard
actions.note: P1 took 3 damage (40->37). P1 drew 1 card from Rhystic Study trigger (hand 3->4). Engine correctly fires the OpponentCastsSpell trigger via enrich_spec_from_def. Confirmed by test_rhystic_study_enrich_path_trigger_fires.
